2605.13517.title: ArcVQ-VAE: A Spherical Vector Quantization Framework with ArcCosine Additive Margin
2605.13517.paper_summary: Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) has become a fundamental framework for learning discrete representations in image modeling. However, VQ-VAE models must tokenize entire images using a finite set of codebook vectors, and this capacity limitation restricts their ability to capture rich and diverse representations. In this paper, we propose ArcCosine Additive Margin VQ-VAE (ArcVQ-VAE), a novel vector quantization framework that introduces a spherical angular-margin prior (SAMP) for the codebook of a conventional VQ-VAE. The proposed SAMP consists of Ball-Bounded Norm Regularization, which constrains all codebook vectors within a time-dependent Euclidean ball, and ArcCosine Additive Margin Loss, which encourages greater angular separability among latent vectors. This formulation promotes more discriminative and uniformly dispersed latent representations within the constrained space, thereby improving effective latent-space coverage and leading to improved codebook utilization. Experimental results on standard image reconstruction and generation tasks show that ArcVQ-VAE achieves competitive performance against baseline models in terms of reconstruction accuracy, representation diversity, and sample quality. The code is available at: https://github.com/goals4292/ArcVQ-VAE
2605.13517.paper_summary_zh: 向量量化變分自編碼器（VQ-VAE）已成為學習圖像建模中離散表示的基本框架。<lb/>然而，VQ-VAE 模型必須使用有限的碼本向量對整個圖像進行標記，而這一容量限制限制了它們捕捉豐富和多樣化表示的能力。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了弧餘弦附加邊際 VQ-VAE（ArcVQ-VAE），這是一種新穎的向量量化框架，為傳統 VQ-VAE 的碼本引入了一種球形角度邊際先驗（SAMP）。<lb/>所提出的 SAMP 包含球界範數正則化，這限制了所有碼本向量在一個隨時間變化的歐幾里得球內，並且包含弧餘弦附加邊際損失，這鼓勵潛在向量之間具有更大的角度可分性。<lb/>這一公式促進了在受限空間內更具區分性和均勻分散的潛在表示，從而改善了有效潛在空間的覆蓋，並提高了碼本的利用率。<lb/>在標準圖像重建和生成任務上的實驗結果顯示，ArcVQ-VAE 在重建準確性、表示多樣性和樣本質量方面對基準模型達到了競爭性能。<lb/>代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/goals4292/ArcVQ-VAE
2605.13517.author: Jaeyung Kim et.al.
